body.title: Add in_use_now() check to restart_ollama tool
body.result: Added in_use_now() guard to restart_ollama tool to prevent restarting Ollama when humans are actively using the machine. Matches existing pattern in cluster_router.score(). Tests pass (412). Commit: aaf19e8c
body.description: restart_ollama fires when Ollama slow but skips in_use_now(). Spawned second instance on yoga9i during human use. Fix: add in_use_now(hostname) check in tools/cluster_ssh.py restart_ollama — if in-use, log warning and return. Same guard already in cluster_router.score(). S-size.
